data.title: Bitcoin's Thursday Flash Crash Wiped Out $500 Million: What's Driving The Volatility?
data.description: Bitcoin‘s (CRYPTO: BTC) volatile trading around the $100,000 mark has sparked heated debate about what it driving the increased volatility.

data.title: What's Going On With US Listed Chinese Stocks Alibaba, JD, Nio, Li, XPeng On Friday?
data.description: US-listed Chinese stocks are trading higher ahead of China's key policy meeting in the upcoming week, as investors anticipate more stimulus measures to drive the economy and beat potential US tariffs. BABA, JD, BIDU, NIO, LI, and XPEV all saw gains.

data.title: Hurricane Impacts Kirkland's Q3 Performance, Focuses On Beyond Partnership To Sparks Growth
data.description: Kirkland's Inc. reported Q3 2024 sales decline of 1.7%, beating consensus. Comparable sales decreased 3.0%, gross margin expanded, and operating loss reduced. Formed a strategic partnership and ended with 325 stores.
